author: Joshua Martinez
name: SP1024 + Pre-quant TTT + Parallel Residuals + QK5 + EMA
blurb: SP1024 tokenizer (1024 vocab), 11L 512-dim 8H/4KVH, pre-quantization TTT (6 epochs, lr=0.0005, freeze 2 blocks) delivers ~0.034 BPB gain. Parallel residuals from layer 7+, QK-Gain 5.0, EMA 0.9965. Int6 GPTQ + brotli compression. Sliding window eval + ETLB. 3-seed mean: 1.07389 BPB (best: 1.07357), beating official SOTA 1.1147 by 0.041 BPB (3.66%, ~0.059 nats, p<<0.001).
